external_blockers: multi-employee live browser credentials outside local evidence
goal: Implement UI Lab Phase 1: live-first authorized AI Employee workbench with one shared browser projection controller, route-backed Phase 1 projections, live variants through existing EmployeeExperienceModelV1, explicit fixture separation, and complete Phase 2-5 implementation documents.

maximum_patch.expansion_rule: Record discovered-later evidence before evaluation; stop rather than expanding into Manager, database, Hermes, provider, deployment, replay storage, launcher rewrite, or generated runtime Phase 2-5 work.

non_goals: Do not implement generated bespoke application runtime beyond existing variants.
Do not implement recording/replay or launcher topology rewrite.
Do not modify Manager, database migrations, provider adapters, Hermes integration, deployment, or production compose unless repoctl reveals a hard blocker and the work is explicitly replanned.
unknowns: Whether existing dashboard/employee list APIs are sufficient for UI Lab employee authorization resolution.
Whether normal owner route can be refactored onto the shared provider without broad visual churn.
Whether current browser harness can validate live routes without a live logged-in fixture stack.
